changelog: NEW: Integrated a dynamic promotion detection system that automatically displays current special offers and discounts directly on the Pro version reference button.
CHANGED: Overhauled the application installer to support seamless updates; installing future versions no longer requires manually uninstalling the previous release.

CHANGED: Migrated the update checker framework from GitHub to the official website API; future update alerts will now direct users to a central download page on the official website, allowing them to choose their preferred distribution platform.
CHANGED: Implemented minor UI adjustments and visual refinements across several areas of the application to enhance interface consistency.
FIXED: Corrected and improved localization strings across all supported languages for better accuracy.
NEW: Introduced a plugin compatibility detection system that automatically verifies if installed plug-ins are fully compatible with the current application version.
CHANGED: Overhauled the application installer to support seamless updates; installing future versions no longer requires manually uninstalling the previous release.
CHANGED: Migrated the update checker framework from GitHub to the official website API.
CHANGED: Implemented minor UI adjustments and visual refinements across several areas of the application to enhance interface consistency.
CHANGED: Updated the plugin gallery behavior to display a mandatory notification reminding users to restart the application after installing or updating any plug-ins.
FIXED: Corrected and improved localization strings across all supported languages for better accuracy.

1.3.0.3: NEW: Integrated a dynamic promotion detection system that automatically displays current special offers and discounts directly on the Pro version reference button.
CHANGED: Overhauled the application installer to support seamless updates; installing future versions no longer requires manually uninstalling the previous release.

CHANGED: Migrated the update checker framework from GitHub to the official website API; future update alerts will now direct users to a central download page on the official website, allowing them to choose their preferred distribution platform.
CHANGED: Implemented minor UI adjustments and visual refinements across several areas of the application to enhance interface consistency.
FIXED: Corrected and improved localization strings across all supported languages for better accuracy.
CHANGED: Refactored core code to minimize false positives in Windows Defender, reducing safe software warnings caused by the application's process-handling capabilities.
CHANGED: Updated internal software libraries to their latest versions to ensure optimal performance and security.
CHANGED: Implemented minor UI adjustments and visual refinements in several areas of the application to enhance overall interface consistency.
NEW: Integrated a Terms of Service agreement window that appears upon the first launch of the application.
NEW: Introduced a dedicated button in the user interface referencing the new PRO version, which premieres alongside this 1.3.0 release.
